issue_summary: Add first version of a FluentIterable implementation, cleanup recently toString methods in IterableUtils, add SkippingIterator and additional methods to IteratorUtils and IterableUtils.
javadoc_before:
/** * Returns the index-th value in {@link Iterator}, throwing * IndexOutOfBoundsException if there is no such element. *

* The Iterator is advanced to index (or to the end, if * index exceeds the number of entries) as a side effect of this method. * * @param iterator the iterator to get a value from * @param index the index to get * @param the type of object in the {@link Iterator} * @return the object at the specified index * @throws IndexOutOfBoundsException if the index is invalid * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the object type is invalid */
javadoc_after:
/** * Returns the index-th value in {@link Iterator}, throwing * IndexOutOfBoundsException if there is no such element. *

* The Iterator is advanced to index (or to the end, if * index exceeds the number of entries) as a side effect of this method. * * @param iterator the iterator to get a value from * @param index the index to get * @param the type of object in the {@link Iterator} * @return the object at the specified index * @throws IndexOutOfBoundsException if the index is invalid * @throws IllegalArgumentException if the object type is invalid * @deprecated since 4.1, use {@code IteratorUtils.get(Iterator, int)} instead */
